title: T-018 — Autofilter logic + reopenDeptSection Server Action (NPD-a.5)
prompt:
# T-018 — Autofilter + reopenDeptSection

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §7.5, §2.2 (closed_flag.unset)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide reopenDeptSection Server Action and a query helper that supports the dept-view autofilter (default WHERE closed_<dept> != 'Yes', toggle 'Show closed').

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/reopen-dept-section.ts: requires closed_flag.unset perm with scope=dept; sets closed_<dept>='' and emits fa.dept_reopened event. Plus packages/queries/src/list-fa-by-dept.ts: listFaByDept(dept, {showClosed?}) returning FA rows filtered by autofilter + indexed lookup. Add composite index migration 0018 on (tenant_id, closed_<dept>) per dept.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/reopen-dept-section.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/reopen-dept-section.test.ts [create]
- packages/queries/src/list-fa-by-dept.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0018_autofilter_indexes.sql [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fa with closed_core='Yes', when listFaByDept('Core',{}) runs (showClosed=false), then row excluded; when showClosed=true, then row included
2. Given user role npd_manager calls reopenDeptSection(code,'Core'), when run, then closed_core='' and fa.dept_reopened event emitted
3. Given migration 0018 ran, when EXPLAIN listFaByDept query, then planner uses (tenant_id, closed_core) index

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for filter, reopen action, index usage via EXPLAIN
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test reopen-dept-section && pnpm --filter queries test list-fa-by-dept'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow reopen without closed_flag.unset permission
- Do not omit composite indexes (perf gate)
- Do not bypass RLS in listFaByDept

pipeline_inputs.description: reopenDeptSection action + list-fa-by-dept query helper with composite indexes for autofilter perf.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0018 adds composite indexes on (tenant_id, closed_<dept>) per dept. Action requires closed_flag.unset perm (scoped). List query supports showClosed toggle.
out_of_scope: Do not implement dept proxy view UI here (T-019)
